description: You are a software developer with RSI who uses Talon Voice for hands-free coding in Visual Studio Code. Create a VS Code voice module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community\apps\vscode\ consisting of a context-scoped vscode.talon file with at least 10 functional voice commands for navigation, editing, and code actions that activate only when VS Code is focused, and a vscode.py file defining at least 3 custom action implementations using the Talon Module/Context API.
